description: Style NoteArt Limited Edition from the house of boss is inspired by urban life and it's environmen. It has a combination of fruits, herbs and aromatic pine accords. It comes in a green-blue flacon with stylish print.Product DetailsThe top notes of are bergamot, grapefruit, basil, mint, melting into heart notes of geranium, sage, jasmine, lavender and clove. The base notes of sandalwood, cedarwood, patchouli, musk and vetiver.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize150 ml
